title: Genomic DNA Extraction from Animal Faecal Tissues Using DNeasy Kit
author: Somasundhari Shanmuganandam
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.6bbhain

steps.title: Thaw the samples in ice and...
steps.instruction: Thaw the samples in ice and bring it to room temperature

steps.title: Using a scapel, place the tissue...
steps.instruction: Using a scapel, place the tissue in a petri dish and cut 50 mg of tissue. Check the tissue weight to confirm. Place it in a 2 ml eppendorf tube filled with 0.5 cm of purified silica beads.

steps.title: Add 324 μl of buffer ATL...
steps.instruction: Add 324 μl of buffer ATL and 36 μl of proteinase K into each of the bead tubes containing sample. For reagent only control, take empty bead tube and add only buffer ATL and proteinase K.

steps.title: Place the bead tubes into the...
steps.instruction: Place the bead tubes into the bead beater for 2 x 20 sec and spin it down.

steps.title: Incubate the samples at 56°C in...
steps.instruction: Incubate the samples at 56°C in heat block for 10 min to 30 min. Actual time depends on tissue lysis

steps.title: Add 4 μl of RNase A...
steps.instruction: Add 4 μl of RNase A (100 mg/ml) to the lysed samples, vortex and incubate for 5 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Vortex and transfer 200 μl of...
steps.instruction: Vortex and transfer 200 μl of the sample solution into a new 1.5 ml eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant (as much as...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant (as much as possible) into a new 1.5 ml eppendorf tube and discard the pellet. Note: The supernatant may contain tiny tissue fragments which can be lysed in the next step

steps.title: Add 200 μl of buffer AL and vortex
steps.instruction: Add 200 μl of buffer AL and vortex.

steps.title: Add 200 μl of ethanol pipetting up and down
steps.instruction: Add 200 μl of ethanol pipetting up and down. Vortex. Note : Step 10 must be done immediately after step 9

steps.title: Tranfer the entire content of the...
steps.instruction: Tranfer the entire content of the eppendorf tube into a spin column provided with the kit.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 6,000 rcf for 1 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 6,000 rcf for 1 min. Discard the flow through and collection tube.

steps.title: Place a new collection tube under...
steps.instruction: Place a new collection tube under the spin column and add 500 μl of buffer AW1

steps.title: Centrifuge at 6,000 rcf for 1 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 6,000 rcf for 1 min. Discard the flow through and collection tube.

steps.title: Place a new collection tube under...
steps.instruction: Place a new collection tube under the spin column and add 500 μl of buffer AW2.

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed (13,000 rcf) for 3 mins
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed (13,000 rcf) for 3 mins

steps.title: Discard the flow through and place...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow through and place the same collection tube back into the column. Perform centrifuge for 1 min at maximum speed

steps.title: Discard collection tube and place a 1
steps.instruction: Discard collection tube and place a 1.5 ml eppendorf tube under the column and add 100 μl of buffer AE. Let it stand for 1 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 6000 rcf for 1 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 6000 rcf for 1 min.

steps.title: Pipette the eluted DNA from the...
steps.instruction: Pipette the eluted DNA from the eppenforf tube and add it into the column again for re-elution

steps.title: Let it stand for one min...
steps.instruction: Let it stand for one min and centrifuge at 6000 rcf for 1 min.

steps.title: Discard the filter column
steps.instruction: Discard the filter column. Store 50 μl of eluted DNA at 4°C for quantitative analysis and store the rest at -20°C to prevent repeated freeze-thaw cycle.

steps.title: Prepare 0
steps.instruction: Prepare 0.8% agarose gel and run at 100 V for 40-45 min to check the quality of DNA extracted

steps.title: Make sure the qubit is standardised prior to starting
steps.instruction: Make sure the qubit is standardised prior to starting

steps.title: Use qubit broad range DNA assay...
steps.instruction: Use qubit broad range DNA assay kit and perform analysis using 1 μl of extracted DNA. Note down the concentration value (ng/μl)

steps.title: Use 2 μl of distilled water...
steps.instruction: Use 2 μl of distilled water as blank and 2 μl of buffer AE as standard. Clean the surface between each read.

steps.title: Add 2 μl of sample DNA...
steps.instruction: Add 2 μl of sample DNA into the surface of the nanodrop and read. Clean the surface before next use. Note down the A260/280, A260/230 and concentration (ng/μl)
